// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace MainApp
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from MainApp.
    /// </summary>
    public static class MainAppServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddMainApp(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton<global::MainApp.Mediator>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
            {
                var s0 = new global::MainApp.Mediator(sp);
                return s0;
            });

            return services;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all services tagged with 'Mediator'.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddMainApp_Mediator(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler1<>), typeof(global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler1<>));
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler2<>), typeof(global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler2<>));
            services.AddSingleton<global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler1<global::MainApp.Entity1>, global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler1<global::MainApp.Entity1>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::SharedModule.IRequestHandler<global::MainApp.GenericRequest1<global::MainApp.Entity1>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::MainApp.Entity1>>, global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler1<global::MainApp.Entity1>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler2<global::MainApp.Entity2>, global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler2<global::MainApp.Entity2>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::SharedModule.IRequestHandler<global::MainApp.GenericRequest2<global::MainApp.Entity2>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::MainApp.Entity2>>, global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler2<global::MainApp.Entity2>>();

            return services;
        }
    }
}
